Name: Tone Map
Description: Covers parameters relating to the scene tonemapper.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Exposure
Fields.Description: Controls the base exposure level applied within the Yebis tonemapper before curve processing.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Gamma
Fields.Description: Applies gamma correction to the final image, affecting midtone brightness and perceived contrast.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Tone Type
Fields.Description: Selects the tone mapping curve model (e.g. linear, filmic, Reinhard-style) used by Yebis.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Tone Mapping Factor
Fields.Description: Controls the strength or influence of the tone mapping curve on HDR values.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Filmic Contrast
Fields.Description: Adjusts contrast shaping in the filmic tone curve, especially affecting highlights and shadows.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Color Hue
Fields.Description: Applies a global hue shift within the Yebis color grading stage.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Color Saturation
Fields.Description: Controls overall color intensity after tone mapping in the Yebis pipeline.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Color Value
Fields.Description: Adjusts brightness scaling applied during Yebis color grading.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Contrast
Fields.Description: Applies final contrast adjustment within the Yebis post-processing stage.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Enable Auto Exposure
Fields.Description: Enables or configures automatic exposure adaptation based on scene luminance.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Delay Frame
Fields.Description: Introduces temporal delay in exposure adaptation to smooth abrupt lighting changes.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Middle Gray
Fields.Description: Defines the reference luminance level treated as neutral gray for auto exposure calculations.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Tone Influenced by Glare
Fields.Description: Controls how much glare/bloom contributes to tone mapping and exposure evaluation.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Minimum Exposure
Fields.Description: Sets the lower bound for automatic exposure to prevent excessive darkening.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Maximum Exposure
Fields.Description: Sets the upper bound for automatic exposure to prevent excessive brightness.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Exposure Metering Width
Fields.Description: Defines the horizontal size of the region used for luminance sampling in auto exposure.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Exposure Metering Height
Fields.Description: Defines the vertical size of the region used for luminance sampling in auto exposure.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Exposure Metering Offset: X
Fields.Description: Offsets the exposure sampling region horizontally from screen center.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Exposure Metering Offset: Y
Fields.Description: Offsets the exposure sampling region vertically from screen center.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Bright Adaptation Sensitivity
Fields.Description: Controls how strongly exposure reacts to increases in scene brightness.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Bright Adaptation Scale
Fields.Description: Scales the magnitude of exposure adjustment when adapting to bright scenes.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Bright Adaptation Speed Limit
Fields.Description: Limits how quickly exposure can increase when transitioning to brighter environments.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Dark Adaptation Sensitivity
Fields.Description: Controls how strongly exposure reacts to decreases in scene brightness.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Dark Adaptation Scale
Fields.Description: Scales the magnitude of exposure adjustment when adapting to darker scenes.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Dark Adaptation Speed Limit
Fields.Description: Limits how quickly exposure can decrease when transitioning to darker environments.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Bright to Dark Adaptation Scale Ratio
Fields.Description: Controls the balance between brightening and darkening adaptation strengths.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Vignette Power
Fields.Description: Controls the intensity of edge darkening applied by the Yebis vignette effect.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Vignette FOV Dependence
Fields.Description: Adjusts vignette strength relative to camera field of view.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Enable Chromatic Aberration
Fields.Description: Enables color channel separation to simulate lens chromatic aberration.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Wave Sample
Fields.Description: Controls the sampling resolution used for dispersion or aberration wave simulation.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Tone Lateral Dispersion (0)
Fields.Description: Controls horizontal color channel offset for chromatic dispersion.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Tone Lateral Dispersion (1)
Fields.Description: Controls vertical color channel offset for chromatic dispersion.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Tone Uniform Dispersion (0)
Fields.Description: Applies uniform color channel offset across the image for dispersion effects.

Fields.Name: Yebis: Tone Uniform Dispersion (1)
Fields.Description: Secondary parameter controlling uniform dispersion strength or direction.

Fields.Name: Average Luminance
Fields.Description: Displays or controls the computed average scene luminance used for exposure calculations.

Fields.Name: Luminance Balance: R
Fields.Description: Adjusts the contribution of the red channel to overall luminance calculation.

Fields.Name: Luminance Balance: G
Fields.Description: Adjusts the contribution of the green channel to overall luminance calculation.

Fields.Name: Luminance Balance: B
Fields.Description: Adjusts the contribution of the blue channel to overall luminance calculation.

Fields.Name: Scaler: R
Fields.Description: Applies a scaling factor to the red color channel before tone mapping.

Fields.Name: Scaler: G
Fields.Description: Applies a scaling factor to the green color channel before tone mapping.

Fields.Name: Scaler: B
Fields.Description: Applies a scaling factor to the blue color channel before tone mapping.

Fields.Name: Tone Map Mode
Fields.Description: Selects the tone mapping algorithm used to convert HDR values into displayable color range.

Fields.Name: Contrast
Fields.Description: Adjusts overall image contrast after tone mapping.

Fields.Name: Final Gamma
Fields.Description: Applies final gamma correction to convert from linear space to display space.

Fields.Name: Use LUT Table
Fields.Description: Enables use of a lookup table (LUT) for tone mapping instead of analytic curves.

Fields.Name: Enable Auto Exposure
Fields.Description: Enables automatic exposure adjustment based on scene brightness over time.

Fields.Name: Auto Exposure: Light Adaptation Speed
Fields.Description: Controls how quickly exposure adapts to brightening scenes.

Fields.Name: Auto Exposure: Dark Adaptation Speed
Fields.Description: Controls how quickly exposure adapts to darker scenes.

Fields.Name: Auto Exposure: Middle Gray
Fields.Description: Defines the reference luminance level considered neutral gray for exposure calculation.

Fields.Name: Auto Exposure: Center Weight
Fields.Description: Weights exposure calculation toward the center of the screen.

Fields.Name: Max Luminance
Fields.Description: The maximum luminance for the tone mapper.
